message:
🐛 Improve error logging: use console.error instead of console.warn for storage/API failures (#10773)

Fixes #10768

Changed console.warn to console.error for better error visibility in DevTools:
- web/src/lib/api.ts: backend status cache operations (3 locations)
- web/src/components/cards/insights/useInsightActions.ts: storage load/save operations (2 locations)

This ensures errors are properly surfaced in browser error logs for debugging.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
